fields_json: {"stationTitle": "Foundations", "stationNumber": 1, "canonicalSlug": "oh-station-01-foundations", "subtitle": "Foundations: roots and arrivals", "labelCopy": "Roots and arrivals in the Birmingham corridor. From the first foundries to the Pratt mines, this station opens the corridor of voices that built Birmingham. Listen for the names you already half know.", "labelStatus": "Approved", "primaryOralHistorianName": "Selina Mae Hightower", "primaryClipDuration": "4:18", "audioAssetId": "asset-audio-01", "heroImageId": "asset-hero-01", "published": true}

{"stationTitle": "Iron and Smoke", "stationNumber": 2, "canonicalSlug": "oh-station-02-iron-and-smoke", "subtitle": "Iron and smoke: labor at the furnaces", "labelCopy": "Labor at the Sloss furnaces and the Pratt mines. The work was hot. The pay was small. The dignity people held on to anyway is the throughline of this station.", "labelStatus": "Approved", "primaryOralHistorianName": "James Mitchell", "primaryClipDuration": "3:52", "audioAssetId": "asset-audio-02", "heroImageId": "asset-hero-02", "published": true}

{"stationTitle": "Sunday Mornings", "stationNumber": 3, "canonicalSlug": "oh-station-03-sunday-mornings", "subtitle": "Sunday mornings: churches and the song", "labelCopy": "Churches and the song that carried families through. Choirs from First Bethel to Grace Community trace a single line of breath across decades.", "labelStatus": "Approved", "primaryOralHistorianName": "Ruthie Mae Mitchell", "primaryClipDuration": "5:07", "audioAssetId": "asset-audio-03", "heroImageId": "asset-hero-03", "published": true}

{"stationTitle": "Storefronts", "stationNumber": 4, "canonicalSlug": "oh-station-04-storefronts", "subtitle": "Storefronts: corner stores and the neighborhood ledger", "labelCopy": "Corner stores and the neighborhood ledger. From Bessemer to Crestwood, the small businesses that kept change moving and credit honest.", "labelStatus": "Approved", "primaryOralHistorianName": "Vernon Bradshaw", "primaryClipDuration": "4:34", "audioAssetId": "asset-audio-04", "heroImageId": "asset-hero-04", "published": true}

{"stationTitle": "Marches and Meetings", "stationNumber": 5, "canonicalSlug": "oh-station-05-marches-and-meetings", "subtitle": "Marches and meetings: organizing across the decade", "labelCopy": "Organizing across the decade. The marches you remember the names of, and the meetings you have not heard of, both lived in the same kitchens.", "labelStatus": "Approved", "primaryOralHistorianName": "Wendell Pierce", "primaryClipDuration": "5:41", "audioAssetId": "asset-audio-05", "heroImageId": "asset-hero-05", "published": true}

{"stationTitle": "Voter Drives", "stationNumber": 6, "canonicalSlug": "oh-station-06-voter-drives", "subtitle": "Voter drives: the long door knock", "labelCopy": "The long door knock. {"stationTitle": "Women and Work", "stationNumber": 7, "canonicalSlug": "oh-station-07-women-and-work", "subtitle": "Women and work: kitchens, classrooms, clinics", "labelCopy": "Kitchens, classrooms, and clinics.
